prompt: You will be provided with a horse racetrack name and an image. Determine if the image shows the logo of the racetrack

logo_positive: a logo or wordmark as the main subject of the image
a brand emblem or typographic logo as the primary visual focus
logo_negative: a photograph where the main subject is not a logo, such as people, animals, or action
a candid or landscape image where no logo or wordmark is the primary focus
dase_prompts.none_track: not the logo or name of any specific horse racing track

cascade_form: Option E + pair-level cross-modal sem-join. Stage 2 verifies uncertain (track, image) pairs via AI.IF on a CTAS staging table; confident pairs from dase (logo classification + argmax track + abstain via none-of-tracks) are kept directly

tracks: Oak Tree at Santa Anita Park

baseline._status: skipped (1200 cross-join AI.IF; risk of gRPC crash)

cascade.method: Option E pair-level cross-modal join + client-side expand to (ID, filename)
cascade.stage1_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE mmqa.q2a_uncertain_pairs AS
    SELECT track, ot.uri AS uri, ot.ref AS image
    FROM UNNEST(@tracks) AS track WITH OFFSET pos
    JOIN UNNEST(@uris) AS u WITH OFFSET pos2 ON pos = pos2
    JOIN mmqa.images ot ON ot.uri = u
cascade.stage2_sql:
SELECT track, uri
    FROM mmqa.q2a_uncertain_pairs
    WHERE AI.IF(
      (CONCAT('You will be provided with a horse racetrack name and an image. Determine if the image shows the logo of the racetrack. Racetrack: ', track, '.'), image),
      connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
